description_long: This is a tall, rectangular office building with a dark brick facade and a symmetrical arrangement of windows on its front face. The front features three vertical rows of arched windows, each with white trim and some with visible cracks or broken glass, suggesting age or disrepair. The side and rear faces are plain, lacking windows or decorative elements, and are finished in a rough, dark material. The roof appears flat and is bordered by a simple parapet. The overall structure is solid and monolithic, typical of older urban commercial buildings. The building's style and window arrangement evoke late 19th to early 20th-century urban architecture.
description: A tall, dark-brick office building with a symmetrical front of arched windows and a flat roof, showing signs of age and wear.
description_view_0: A plain, dark side of the building with a rough texture and no windows or decorative features.
description_view_1: Another plain, dark side similar to view 0, with a rough, windowless surface.
description_view_2: The front of the building, featuring three vertical rows of arched windows with white trim and some visible damage.
description_view_3: A plain, dark rear side, matching the texture and lack of features seen in views 0 and 1.
attribute_window_pattern: Three vertical rows of evenly spaced, arched windows with consistent spacing and white trim on the front facade.
